'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 13''' was the 13th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Star Sightings|New Hopes]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]
*[[Star Wars Q&A|Q&A]]
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Book Round-Up

===Features===
*"[[Liam Neeson: Jedi Master]]" {{C|retitled "Prequel Update: Liam Neeson", from [[Star Wars Insider 36|''Star Wars Insider'' 36]]}}
*"[[Something Wicked This Way Comes]]" {{C|retitled "The Emperor Strikes Back", from [[Star Wars Insider 37|''Star Wars Insider'' 37]]}}
*"[[Ice Magic]]" {{C|by [[Jim Swallow]]}}
*:<small>[[Allan Bryce]], the special effects location unit supervisor on ''The Empire Strikes Back'', remembers the film's arduous Norwegian shoot.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Unfair Cop
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]]' Tunisian diary continues. This issue: Lady G comes a cropper.</small>
*"[[Toys' Story]]"
*:<small>A special report by [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Stephen J. Sansweet|Steve Sansweet]] on the creative effort that goes into originating [[Hasbro]]'s acclaimed range of ''Star Wars'' toys.</small>
*''[[Star Wars: The Jabba Tape|The Jaba Tape]]''
*:<small>The second instalment of this new four-part story.</small>
*"[[Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II Players Guide|''Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II'' Players Guide]]"
*:<small>By popular demand, we present the first instalment of a definitive two-part solution to the LucasArts game.</small>
